payload.label: mirror
payload.long_description: Vertical, rectangular silver-framed wall mirror shown partially cropped at the edges, with a reflective surface that displays a tripod and nearby wall; surface appears warped and contains digital reconstruction artifacts; estimated ~2.0 m from camera.
